Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alaska"

Video.summary: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma getting the Oklahoma turkey season kicked off.
Video.title: "Turkey Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: Randy is at the Raven in Missouri trying to take advantage of some dry weather and get some Big Tine borderline planted and check off a long list of other summer time prep work as opening day of deer season will be here before we know it.
Video.title: "Summer Time Work On The Raven"

Video.summary: An Honor No One Wants: A Gold Star Family is the immediate family member(s) of a fallen soldier who died while serving in a time of conflict. Ginger Gilbert-Ravella honors the memory her husband…American hero Troy Gilbert.
Video.title: "Ginger Gilbert-Ravella"

Video.summary: Phillip and Drake hunt with friends Michael and Adam Reinbott during the opening week of Turkey Season in Tennessee. The gobblers are on fire and putting on a show.
Video.title: "3 Turkeys In 2 Days | Tennessee Opener" (Broke)

Video.summary: Across the country, deer season to many Americans is a rite of passage. For generations, Winchester has been the trusted ammunition choice for hunters…and it’s been a decade since the game-changing Deer Season XP whitetail line was introduced. In this episode, we’ll celebrate the many successes by Team Winchester hunters in the field during whitetail and mule deer firearm seasons across the United States. - GUESTS: Melissa Bachman (Team Winchester) Mark Drury (Team Winchester) Nikki Boxler (Team Winchester) Chris Keefer (Team Winchester) Casey Keefer (Team Winchester) Jason Gilbertson (Team Winchester)
Video.title: "Decade Of Deer Season"

Video.summary: Josh heads offshore for the first day of red snapper season with his friend Joe Koenraad.
Video.title: "Opening Day"

Video.summary: Nobody chases the waterfowl migration as hard as Shawn Stahl of Team Winchester. The Michigan native spends over half of his year running the highways and flyways searching for the x. In this episode, we’ll tag along with Shawn and his crew with their Winchester pumps in hand as they hunker down hiding in fields and timber in hopes of locked wings from ducks and geese.
Video.title: "Stahled Out"

Video.summary: Overview: East Alton, Illinois is the home of Winchester Ammunition and the manufacturing home of the shotshell plants that build and produce millions of rounds of ammo for hunters, sport shooters, military and law enforcement. Get an unprecedented inside look at the birth cycle of a shotshell inside the walls of Winchester. From hull to primer, shot to wad and packaging to shipping, watch how the most legendary and successful ammunition brand in the world comes to is born and built.
Video.title: "Building The Legend"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alabama"

Video.summary: Trenton and Rex link up with Gehrig Dieter and Anthony Sherman from the Kansas City Chiefs. While filling the boat with crappie they got to learn about the guys and their careers in the NFL.
Video.title: "Crappie Kingdom"

Video.summary: A day of reef fishing in Islamorada turns into a Kingfish and Yellowtail frenzy for Captains Scott and Steve.
Video.title: "Silver And Gold"

Video.summary: It only takes 3 fish to fill the Yeti cooler when Capt. Scott fishes the top with kites for Wahoo and Steve pulls a big Mutton Snapper off the bottom.
Video.title: "Wahoos On Kites"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve take a long run into the Gulf from Stock Island and load the coolers with Cobia and huge Yellowtail Snapper.
Video.title: "Stock Island Grocery Run"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve head west from Key West to battle with big kingfish and end up with plenty of meat for the smoker.
Video.title: "Kingfishing West Of Key West"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve head out early out of Key West, Scott picks away at the Yellowtail Snapper while Steve plays around with Cero Mackerel on fly.
Video.title: "Key West Yellowtails And Cero On Fly"

Image.alt: "Key West Yellowtails And Cero On Fly"
"Key West Yellowtails And Cero On Fly"
"Key West Yellowtails And Cero On Fly"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve catch Bonitas for bait and slow troll them around wrecks for Wahoo and Kingfish.
Video.title: "Trolling Bonitas Out Of Key West"

Video.summary: Brandon meets up with his buddy Dave for some crystal river bank beating. Throwing top water lures on the nature coast? It doesn’t get much better than this!
Video.title: "Top Water Dave"

Video.summary: The Spring Thunder crew teams up with the guys from Hunt Club and Realtree Roadtrips to take a group of veterans on a life changing turkey hunt at Redstone Arsenal in Huntsville, AL.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Veterans Hunt"

Video.summary: David Blanton heads to Mississippi to hunt his friend Richard Reid's property. Setting up in the dark proves to make the difference as the birds fly down into the field!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "David Mississippi"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared travels to Venice, Louisiana, where the Mississippi River meets the Gulf, joining Capt. Garrett George and Capt. Jesse Leboeuf for an action-packed offshore adventure in pursuit of Redfish and Tuna.
Video.title: "LA Tuna Pt 1"

Video.summary: On this adventure, we tag along with the Disabled American Veterans of Minnesota "Outdoor Programs" as they travel to Texas for a Hog hunt. We also honor our next Wichita Kansas Scheels Hometown Hero, Will Rivera!
Video.title: "Dav of MN Texas Hog Hunt"

Video.summary: The boys are still at the Raven in Missouri trying to finish planting 50 acres of Big Tine food plots in 5 days. Then Randy heads to the Powder River in Montana and tries to knock down his first buck of the 2025 season.
Video.title: "50 Acres In 5 Days Part 2"

Video.summary: The Crew heads to Rivers Lodge and Hunt Club in Kansas to fish strip pits. Trenton and Rex take on Mike and Nate in a 3 period mini tournament. With multiple species allowed including northern pike, the two teams are neck and neck after the first two periods. Due to bad weather on day 2, period 3 turned into a hour speed round where only keeper largemouth count.
Video.title: "Rivers"

Video.summary: In this episode, Slade and his son take on the turkey woods for an afternoon hunt. Although the woods remained quiet, a tom soon snuck out of the woods and on the end of Bentley's barrel! After that Slade was able to help a client of his harvest his first turkey! And boy was it an action packed hunt! Jakes, hens, and tons of gobbles, This hunt is spectacular! Lastly, Slade introduces a property that we have already made a video on, but with just how amazing the land is, we had to include it! Floweree is the epitome of a sportsman's paradise!
Video.title: "Two More Turkeys Down in Mississippi!!!"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade, Ryan and Bearcub take on the midwest! After some tough hunting, the group is able to make a move to get in position on a BIG midwestern gobbler! Bearcub was able to harvest him after working the bird for almost 45 minutes! Slade and Ryan also do some Pre-Deer season work, and establish where the fall food-plots will be!
Video.title: "Missouri Turkey Tour!!"

Video.summary: In the Florida Keys, legendary Capt. Paul Ross, son Capt. Pauly, and first mate Mason team up with Capt. Jared Raskob, where one Grouper drop leads to the unexpected.
Video.title: "Unexpected Guest"

Video.summary: He’s the original fishing coach. From the helm of one of the most iconic inshore shows ever made, Captain C.A. Richardson has taught a generation how to fish. This documentary dives into his story. The man, the mission, and the waters that made him who he is.
Video.title: "CA"

Video.summary: U.S. Marines combat correspondent Ken Plant tells of being captured and tortured as a POW.
Video.title: "Ken Plant"

Video.summary: Nuclear sized mutton snapper bend rods and break backs as Nick joins Capt. Kevin Rowley on the Big Pine Key reefs.
Video.title: "Mutant Muttons in Big Pine"

Video.summary: This week the teams descend upon Cornwall, Ontario for Qualifier 4 to fish Lake St. Francis for back to back events over the weekend.
Video.title: BaitFuel Fishing Tour - "Qualifier 4 - Cornwall, Ontario"

Video.summary: Justin Webb heads to Tennessee to hunt with Phillip Culpepper, hoping to get an Eastern in his quest for a Grand Slam. Next stop - Wyoming for a Merriam.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Big Eastern Dreams"

Video.summary: Rusty Creasey joins the Spring Thunder crew for an incredible turkey hunt in Oklahoma. The guys are blessed to fill 6 tags in a short time and have several memorable hunts.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Oklahoma"

Video.summary: We love our college chapters. Hudson has been a long time member of TTHA as well as serving with the Texas A&M Chapter. We have a great time at G2 in pursuit of Axis deer.
Video.title: "A&M Axis"

Video.summary: Denise Sanchez was awarded a hunt at G2 following our Hunters Extravaganza drawings. Its great to get to spend time on the ranch with new members of TTHA. Denise gets familiar with a giant and learns about new technology while on this hunt.
Video.title: "A Newfound Passion"

Video.summary: Phillip Culpepper heads to Maryland to turkey hunt with Camospace Sweepstakes winner Brian Niblett. After have a gobbler slip away off the roost the guys only have a few more hours to get it done before the noon hunting cutoff.
Video.title: "Helicopter Flys In On Gobbler"

Video.summary: JP’s last week in the Keys and he decides to try fishing for Snook using smallmouth soft plastic techniques.
Video.title: "Smallie Style Snook"

Video.summary: A recap of this season's favorite fish!
Video.title: "Season 4 Wrap Up"

Video.summary: Embark on an adventure with Captain Danny Allen & Travis Blucher as they explore the captivating landscapes of Orange Lake, FL. From wildlife encounters to thrilling fishing expeditions, witness the beauty and excitement of this serene locale on Beyond the Surface TV. Join them as they delve deep into the heart of nature, sharing stories and insights that highlight the unique charm of Orange Lake and its significance as a haven for outdoor enthusiasts. Don't miss this unforgettable journey through the hidden treasures of one of Florida's most picturesque destinations.
Video.title: "Orange Lake Odyssey"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike Anderson and Capt. Ryan Rickard keep track of the catch during an epic day in Steinhatchee, FL.
Video.title: "Friendly Competition Part 1"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff join a local biologist searching for a white rhino whose tracking collar has failed, leaving it exposed to poachers. As they follow its trail through the African bush, the search builds toward a heart-pounding encounter that none of them will ever forget.
Video.title: "Africa Part 3"

Video.summary: During this episode of Ship Shape TV Essentials the SSTV team take a trip to Marine Surplus in order to gather miscellaneous parts for AquaSport project such as cleats, rod holders, and a rub rail getting them one step closer to finishing the project. The crew then heads back to the project were they get to work on installing the parts gathered and getting the AquaSport accessorized.
Video.title: Essentials - "Accessorizing the AquaSport"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson is in for an adrenaline-packed adventure in Croatia as he targets the elusive Kri Kri Ibex and Mouflon. With expert guides and unwavering determination, Mark navigates rugged terrain and thrilling hunts, showcasing the excitement and skill of the hunting industry. - As his time in Croatia winds down, the episode captures the essence of ethical practices and the intense pursuit that defines this exhilarating sport. Don’t miss the epic conclusion to Mark’s expedition, where passion, skill, and the thrill of the hunt converge in unforgettable moments.
Video.title: "Hunting Mouflon and Hybrid Kri Kri Ibex- Dugi Otok Island In Croatia"

Image.alt: "Hunting Mouflon and Hybrid Kri Kri Ibex- Dugi Otok Island In Croatia"
"Hunting Mouflon and Hybrid Kri Kri Ibex- Dugi Otok Island In Croatia"
"Hunting Mouflon and Hybrid Kri Kri Ibex- Dugi Otok Island In Croatia"

Video.summary: With Meredith McCord halfway around the world, Capt. Justin Leake gives show producer Chris Hermans his first shot at landing a tarpon after filming them for 9 seasons. Does art imitate life?
Video.title: "Tarpon Producer"

Video.summary: Capt. Justin Leake joins some old friends on board the Fall Line in hopes of scoring big in the Bay Point Billfish Open. This trip will test the limits of all the anglers as the skilled captain and crew do the impossible in hopes of bringing home the prize.
Video.title: "Billfish Tourney"

Video.summary: The mission of Shoot United is to be a content resource for millions of shooters and a place where people can learn, build confidence and find ways to participate. Through films, educational videos and articles, SU has impacted countless shooters all over the world. In this episode, join Shoot United Ambassadors as they inspire and educate through a series of instructional videos and stories in pistol, self-defense, trap and skeet and sporting clays. - GUESTS: Thea Van Sync (Team Winchester) Callie Farill (Team Winchester) Becky Yackley (Team Winchester) Theo Ribbs (Team Winchester) Jessica Hook (Team Winchester)
Video.title: "Shooting United"

Video.summary: Spring in Michigan means turkey season is on. In this episode of Winchester Life, the crew returns for Turkey Camp 2025, where changing weather, early mornings, and vocal birds set the tone for the week. After dialing in their setups at the range, the team heads into the field to chase gobblers across hardwoods and open farmland. From patient sits at sunrise to midday moves and carefully planned decoy strategies, each hunt brings new challenges and opportunities. Close encounters, tough conditions, and well-timed shots highlight the grind of spring turkey hunting, as the crew makes the most of every chance in the Michigan woods.
Video.title: "Camp Longbeard"

Video.summary: Skyler & Clayton kicked off their 2024 Kansas Turkey Season and it ended almost as quick as it started. Both of them tagged out in a hurry within the first few hunts. Some of the best 24 hours of turkey hunting they've ever experienced!
Video.title: "Back to Back"

Video.summary: With bow camp starting off strong at the Dirty Bird, Randy is feeling good about the rest of the week. Until Cody decides to head into town and places a small wager with a stranger.
Video.title: "Where's The TV"

Video.summary: Back at the Raven for bow camp and everything is coming together. Randy has a close encounter with one of the OG bucks on the property while Nate closes the deal on a big five year old.
Video.title: "Good to be Back"

Video.summary: Each year we get to spend time in camp with some of our best friends. Zach from Big & J gets some time in a blind while reflecting on what hunting in Texas means to him. Texas provides a wide variety of game, and chasing these creatures all across the state is some of the best times had.
Video.title: "Valued Partners"

Video.summary: Craig Harrison and Rusty Smith from Caza Outdoors (Los Cazadores, Pnuma, - Trophy Scan, Heated Core & more) hunt with the TTHA crew at the G2 Ranch in Pearsall, TX. Sharing a deer camp with friends is a time honored tradition across the country, and one that we hold near and dear to our hearts here at Texas Trophy Hunters!
Video.title: "Deer Camp with Friends (part 1)"

Video.summary: In this episode, Slade takes us through his new investment property, and breaks down - what’s involved in taking a raw land tract and creating extremely desirable turn-key - hunting properties. - Caleb and Slade double up on some Wilkinson County gobblers for Calebs first turkey - kill ever.
Video.title: "Flips And Flops"

Video.summary: David Blanton has a gobbler in his lap right off the Roost in Kansas hunting with JB Outfitters.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "STRUTTING GOBBLER off the ROOST | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "STRUTTING GOBBLER off the ROOST | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "STRUTTING GOBBLER off the ROOST | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "STRUTTING GOBBLER off the ROOST | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: Kevin and Keelan Harvick head to Realtree Farms in Georgia with Bill Jordan and Roger Culpepper for their annual turkey hunt. The father and son love to spend time together in the outdoors and this trip was definitely one for the books.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Harvicks Hunt Georgia"

Video.summary: Capt. Jonathan Moss is at Highland Park Fish Camp, Speck fishing with Capt. James Hillman.
Video.title: "Highland Park Specks"

Video.summary: In Part 2, Day 2, Mark Peterson continues his quest to complete the Upland Slam of 27 bird species in a series only available on YouTube, The Journey Within – A Bird Hunter’s Diary. Mark is in Alaska hunting the three species of ptarmigan; willow ptarmigan, white-tailed ptarmigan and rock ptarmigan. This is a two part episode where Mark is hunting with his father Earl as they cover miles of rocky terrain in search of these elusive birds in the high elevations of Alaska.
Video.title: Upland Slam - "Alaska Ptarmigan Day 2: - A Bird Hunters Diary"

Image.alt: Upland Slam - "Alaska Ptarmigan Day 2: - A Bird Hunters Diary"
Upland Slam - "Alaska Ptarmigan Day 2: - A Bird Hunters Diary"
Upland Slam - "Alaska Ptarmigan Day 2: - A Bird Hunters Diary"

Video.summary: Bow season is finally here and the boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma. Randy is chasing a buck he named "The Camp Buck" because of how close the buck is to camp. If Randy can get it done this will be his biggest buck to date in Oklahoma.
Video.title: "The Camp Buck"

Video.summary: The crew makes it to Oklahoma. Unfortunately, the weather is not in their favor, but that doesn't slow them down. The morning breaks light, and the crew hears dozens of gobbles.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: Tyler and Colton Jordan go after the eastern bird in the quest for Colton's first ever Grand Slam. David Blanton also hunts opening day and has 6 gobblers come into the decoy.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Georgia Opener"
